title: Blooming Queens Spring Show
description:
A high-kicking, laugh-out-loud spectacle blooming with sequins, sass, and standing ovations. Costumes sparkle, jokes fly, and the queens serve it all night long.

Why Funny Girls?

Blackpool’s iconic drag show, loved by generations of partygoers.

Top 10% attraction worldwide with 35,000+ glowing reviews.

Voted #1 five years straight. Queens, cocktails, unforgettable chaos.

Every season’s a spectacle. Pick your moment and grab your seats.

The talent, the charm, the legs for days — these stars slay every night.

Meet the Cast

Originally from Liverpool, she learned the art of the scathing one-line quip in the clubs of Liverpool city centre and across the UK before joining the Funny Girl’s family in 2006.

Leicester-born Luke, a global sensation, brings his electrifying dance journey from 'Spirit of the Dance' to the stages of Funny Girls, showcasing his diverse talent as a performer, cruise line artist, and choreographer.

Prepared to be amazed and in awe of the high kicking, drop splitting dancing DIVA that is Flexi Belle.

Lewis Bolton, originally starting as a Bar Queen at Funny Girls, received professional training in musical theatre at Blackpool and the Fylde University.

Get ready to be enchanted by Andrea, the Italian charmer making his dazzling debut on the Funny Girls stage, bringing a touch of Sicilian magic to Blackpool!

Fuel the fun with a 3-course pre-show dinner, just £29.85 per person. Your meal is served in Garbo’s, our cosy art deco restaurant, before the curtain rises and the show takes over.

“Such good fun – the Christmas show was amazing, and we’re coming back every year!”

“An absolutely brilliant show – we loved every minute of it!”

“The show is brilliant; great performances throughout and not too risqué. Fabulous costumes and great dancing.”

“An amazing show with Frozen as the ultimate highlight!”

What can I say other than, WOW!!! From the second you enter you feel welcomed and at ease. The staff were brilliant, show was world class and the DJ well Bonnie was just on another level of amazing!”

title: Blooming Queens Spring Show
description:
A high-kicking, laugh-out-loud spectacle blooming with sequins, sass, and standing ovations. Costumes sparkle, jokes fly, and the queens serve it all night long.

Don't miss the Blooming Queens Spring Show, which runs from Thu 22nd Jan 2025 to Sun 17th May 2025.

This iconic drag show in Blackpool has been loved by generations of partygoers, serves as a top 10% worldwide attraction with over 35,000 glowing reviews, and has been voted the best night out in Blackpool for five years straight.

Join us for a night filled with glam, high-energy performances, and unforgettable chaos! Enjoy a delightful 3-course pre-show dinner in Garbo’s, our cozy art-deco restaurant, for just £29.85 per person.

Tickets are available now! Get yours to experience the magic and excitement!
